description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house is surrounded by a small, manicured lawn with a few trees and shrubs, and it is bordered by a sidewalk and street on two sides, suggesting a corner lot placement. The main entryway features a simple, flat overhang and a clear path leading from the sidewalk. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some larger panes facing the street and smaller ones on the sides. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the urban environment.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a small landscaped yard on a corner lot. The design is clean and contemporary, with asymmetrical window placement and a simple entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, lawn, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, asymmetrical windows, and a tree near the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible backyard area, flat roof details, and more greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's depth, additional windows, and a clear view of the corner lot.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small panes
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flat overhang above the main door, direct path from sidewalk, minimal decorative elements
